title: reqwest::Client::build().unwrap_or_default() silently swallows errors in feed.rs
description: feed::run_poller() and feed::poll_all() both call reqwest::Client::builder()...build().unwrap_or_default(). reqwest::ClientBuilder::default() is not a valid HTTP client — it is the Default impl which is equivalent to Client::new() and will silently substitute a client with no timeout and no redirect policy if the configured builder fails. The build() call can only fail on TLS initialization errors, which are fatal for an HTTP client. unwrap_or_default() hides this failure; the correct behavior is to propagate the error (run_poller would need to log and return, poll_all would propagate via ?).
